name: Take Care of the Old Man ☆ Murdoc Niccals
description:
Murdoc is old and tired (more than he already is), he's retired from the music industry, needing someone to deal with his mess and keep him taken care of...of course, you're the poor guy who'll deal with that.

Judge me but I had an intense desire to take care of this old man, especially to give him a bath and leave him clean and tidy.

🏷Tag: caretaker , gorillaz , old , housekeeper
creator: CreeperS2
